James & Olevia

"Every engagement is a ministry moment — not just a performance."

James & Olevia Williams are a brother-sister gospel duo rooted in faith, family, and legacy. Based in Vallejo, CA — ministering across churches, conferences, festivals, and communities throughout the year.

Booking inquiry received

Thank you
for reaching out.

Your booking request has been received and is in good hands. James & Olevia personally review every inquiry — because every invitation is a potential ministry opportunity.

Someone from the J&O team will be in touch with you within 2–3 business days to discuss availability, details, and next steps.

What happens next
1
Inquiry reviewed
Your request is reviewed by the J&O team, usually within 1 business day.
2
Availability confirmed
We check the schedule and confirm whether James & Olevia are available for your date and event type.
3
Personal follow-up
A team member reaches out directly to discuss details, logistics, and next steps toward booking.
